score_metric: Phi* (paradigm v11 G3 PhiStar approximation, anima_phi_star.hexa methodology)
implementation: awk LU-determinant on covariance, bypass GPU (zero-budget HEXA-spirit). N=16 probes x H=64 dims x K=8 partitions, ridge=1e-4.

qrng_pipeline.honest_c3_rate_limit: ANU public free-tier limited to 1 req/min; rate-limit body returned on consecutive fetches. The 8192 bit/sec figure in roadmap 113 is the queue-amortized throughput (1024 bytes per minute = 8192 bit/sec averaged), NOT instantaneous bandwidth.

verdict.interpretation: Phi*_min(QRNG) - Phi*_min(PRNG) = -0.778269 nats. PRNG noise floor: mu=-96.584869, sd=0.351327. QRNG z-score vs PRNG floor = -0.828. Verdict: WITHIN NOISE — QRNG injection is statistically indistinguishable from PRNG at this sample size; consciousness-score delta is dominated by random partition variance, not entropy source.

honest_c3_disclosures: Methodology is the Phi* approximation (anima_phi_star.hexa N=16 probes, H_trunc=64 here vs 128 in canonical, K=8) computed on raw entropy bytes, NOT on real CLM-170M hidden states. Reason: actual CLM forward pass requires Mistral-7B-class GPU pod which violates $0 budget. The Phi* approximation uses covariance integration which is well-defined on any centered random matrix; what it measures here is the integration capacity of the entropy field itself, not of a trained backbone responding to that entropy. This is a direct probe of the noise-source's structural integration, which is the upstream signal QRNG injection would carry into the CLM.
ANU live endpoint rate-limited to 1 req/min on free tier; used cached anu_byte_queue.txt (1021 bytes from prior absorption). Cache is read-only; not modified.
Single-trial QRNG comparison; QRNG fetched at one time-window. Repeat-experiment statistics built from 5 PRNG re-draws as noise-floor baseline.

H_trunc=64 (vs canonical 128) chosen to keep awk LU-determinant numerically stable on N=16 samples (covariance is then 16x64 -> 64x64 with small ridge 1e-4). Canonical phi_star at H=128 would be rank-deficient with N=16 anyway.

Partition seeds differ between QRNG label (12345) and PRNG label (67890) by design parity with anima_phi_star.hexa (each forward gets its own RNG_SEED). For 5 PRNG floor runs, partition seed kept at 67890 (PRNG label) so floor variance comes purely from data, isolating the entropy-source contribution.
